# LearnAnything

> LearnAnything is a free, open-source web application that uses AI (GPT) to generate structured learning paths for any topic. Given a subject, it produces a curated list of key concepts organized into Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced tiers, giving learners a clear roadmap from novice to expert.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.learn-anything.ca/): Search for any topic and generate a learning path instantly
- [About](https://www.learn-anything.ca/about): Meet the developers and learn why LearnAnything was built

## How It Works

1. Enter any topic (e.g. "JavaScript", "How to cook", "Machine Learning")
2. AI generates a structured learning path with concepts ranked by difficulty
3. Concepts are grouped into Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced sections
4. Drag and drop to reorder, then copy the result to your own notes

## Technical Details

- **Frontend**: React 19, Vite, deployed on Vercel
- **Backend**: Python FastAPI, OpenAI GPT API, deployed on Google Cloud Run
- **Open Source**: https://github.com/yixin0829/lp-generator

## Contact & Links

- **Website**: https://www.learn-anything.ca/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/yixin0829/lp-generator
